privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create three synthetic WordPress posts. Post 1 must be titled "The Future of Renewable Energy: A 2026 Outlook", scheduled for "2026-07-14 08:00:00" in category "news" with tags "featured" and "guide". Post 2 requires title "Solar Power Breakthroughs Driving Global Adoption", scheduled for "2026-07-15 08:00:00" in category "technology" with tag "featured". Post 3 requires title "The Economics of Wind Energy in Coastal Communities", scheduled for "2026-07-16 08:00:00" in category "technology" with tag "guide". The expected titles match exact strings in export_result.sh, the date expectations and tag structures are verified in verifier.py, and setup_task.sh creates these required terms.
